productDisplayName: ANT Kids Girls Printed Black Skirt
description: Composition Black printed skirt 100% cotton, has a broad ribbed waist, and an inner skirt lining Fitting Comfort Wash care Dry clean preferred Wash separately using a mild detergent Do not bleach Dry flat in shade Do not iron directly on decorations Crafted from soft cotton fabric, this pretty skirt from ant is all set to offer absolute all-day comfort for your little girl. The broad ribbed waist sits snug, while she enjoys with her playmates in ease. Pair it with pretty tops and floaters.
